value.found_quote: Continue a local Claude Code session from your phone, tablet, or any browser using Remote Control. Works with claude.ai/code and the Claude mobile app.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Remote Control as a feature that lets you continue a local Claude Code session from a phone, tablet, or browser, monitoring and steering it remotely. It states the session keeps running locally and you can send messages from terminal, browser, and phone interchangeably. The page notes "Remote Control is in research preview and available on all plans," indicating preview lifecycle status.
